fields.name: Morning Drift
fields.tastingNotes: citrus, dark chocolate, caramel, toasted almond

extras.bagDescription: Playful white pouch with doodle branding, tasting-note props, and a denser technical back card.

notes: The front simplifies the blend to Colombia/Ethiopia and shows a 15 May 2024 roast date; metadata follows the more detailed back panel blend composition and 20 May 2024 roast date.
